title: Make Object View chrome conform to monday.com style guidelines

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve just started using the object view feature, and looks like it wasn’t designed in keeping with monday.com style guidelines.

Here’s an example screenshot of the problem with a board view below it for comparison:

Artboard3912×2255 708 KB

Can this get fixed up please?

Cc: @Matias.Monday

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @dvdsmpsn!

Would you be able to please open a ticket for us here so we can take this with the team in charge of this feature?

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Done

Done done.
